positive: A cute, forest-themed illustration featuring a group of stylized woodland animals—a sleepy fox, a curious owl, and a bunny—cuddling together among moss and mushrooms. Style should be soft pastel colors, storybook illustration, high detail, cozy, whimsical, storybook art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, dark colors, harsh lines
